title: Middle-Eastern-Style Bulgur Cataplana Tabbouleh
description: A refreshing, high-protein dinner featuring a crisp cataplana vessel filled with a mixture of bulgur, confit-tomato, and herbs, wrapped in puff pastry.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Cut the pastry into a circle or square shape to fit the cataplana vessel.
Place the pastry in the cataplana vessel, pressing it into the corners.
In a large bowl, combine the bulgur, confit-tomato, parsley, mint, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Spoon the bulgur mixture into the pastry-lined cataplana vessel.
Cover the vessel with the remaining pastry, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the cataplana vessel in the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the vessel from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the Middle-Eastern-Style Bulgur Cataplana Tabbouleh warm or at room temperature.
